what: Glasser Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
title: Glasser Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: package contains Glasser HCP multimodal parcellation atlas ggseg. Glasser MF, Coalson TS, Robinson EC, Hacker CD, Harwell J, Yacoub E, Ugurbil K, Andersson J, Beckmann CF, Jenkinson M, Smith SM, & Van Essen DC (2016). multi-modal parcellation human cerebral cortex. Nature, 536, 171-178.

title: Glasser Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: recommend installing ggseg-atlases ggseg r-universe: can install package GitHub :
code: options(repos = c(   ggseg = "https://ggseg.r-universe.dev",   CRAN = "https://cloud.r-project.org" ))  install.packages("ggsegGlasser") # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("ggsegverse/ggsegGlasser")

what: ggsegGlasser: Glasser Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegGlasser-package
title: ggsegGlasser: Glasser Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegGlasser-package
text: Glasser multi-modal cortical parcellation (HCP) atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' object 2D polygon geometry use 'ggseg'.

title: ggsegGlasser: Glasser Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegGlasser-package
text: Maintainer: Athanasia Mo Mowinckel .m.mowinckel@psykologi.uio.(ORCID) Authors: Didac Vidal-Piñeiro d.v.pineiro@psykologi.uio.(ORCID)

title: Glasser Multi-Modal Cortical Parcellation (HCP) — glasser
text: Brain atlas Glasser cortical parcellation 361 regions based Human Connectome Project multi-modal parcellation. Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain().

title: Glasser Multi-Modal Cortical Parcellation (HCP) — glasser
text: Glasser MF, Coalson TS, Robinson EC, Hacker CD, Harwell J, Yacoub E, Ugurbil K, Andersson J, Beckmann CF, Jenkinson M, Smith SM, Van Essen DC (2016). multi-modal parcellation human cerebral cortex. Nature, 536(7615):171-178. doi:10.1038/nature18933

title: Glasser Multi-Modal Cortical Parcellation (HCP) — glasser
code: glasser() #>  #> ── glasser ggseg atlas ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #> Type: cortical #> Regions: 180 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: inferior, lateral, superior, medial #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>    hemi region        label #> 1  left     V1  lh_L_V1_ROI #> 2  left    MST lh_L_MST_ROI #> 3  left     V6  lh_L_V6_ROI #> 4  left     V2  lh_L_V2_ROI #> 5  left     V3  lh_L_V3_ROI #> 6  left     V4  lh_L_V4_ROI #> 7  left     V8  lh_L_V8_ROI #> 8  left      4   lh_L_4_ROI #> 9  left     3b  lh_L_3b_ROI #> 10 left    FEF lh_L_FEF_ROI #> ... with 350 more rows plot(glasser())

title: ggsegGlasser 2.0.4
text: Atlas 2D geometry migrated sf-optional brain_polygons format (ggseg.formats 0.0.3). atlases now render without sf GDAL/GEOS/PROJ system libraries, enabling wasm air-gapped installs. Plots unchanged.

title: ggsegGlasser 1.0.01
text: adapted atlases ggseg <= 1.6.0 Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
